positive: A whimsical, cozy illustration of a sleepy fox curled up in a basket of oversized, glowing mushrooms. The style is highly detailed watercolor and ink, reminiscent of Studio Ghibli meets Beatrix Potter. The fox has soft, autumnal fur tones, and the mushrooms glow with a gentle bioluminescence. Surrounded by delicate moss and dew drops. Soft pastel color palette, cinematic volumetric lighting, extreme detail, trending on ArtStation, hyper-realistic texture, 8k, masterpiece.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, harsh lines, photorealism, grainy, monochrome, oversaturated
